notes: Orders page loads at /orders with data grid showing 10 rows
Columns are: Order#, Product, Qty, Status, Priority, Assigned To, Due Date. Missing 'Created' column. 'Quantity' shown as 'Qty'.
10 rows displayed on page 1 (ORD-015 through ORD-006)
Pagination shows 'Showing 1-10 of 15'
Next page shows 'Showing 11-15 of 15' with rows ORD-005 through ORD-001
Previous button returns to page 1, showing '1-10 of 15'
Page number buttons 1 and 2 rendered, plus Previous/Next buttons
Last page (page 2) has 5 rows, fewer than 10
Ascending sort: ORD-001 through ORD-010 with arrow indicator
Descending sort: ORD-015 through ORD-006 with down arrow indicator
Due Date descending: 3/28 -> 3/26 -> ... -> 3/14
Priority ascending: Critical, Critical, High x5, Low x3
Status ascending: Approved, Completed x2, Draft x2, In Production x4, Quality Check
Status filter dropdown present with options: All Statuses, Draft, Submitted, Approved, In Production, Quality Check, Quality Hold, Completed
Filtered to Draft: 2 orders shown
Filtered to In Production: 4 orders shown
Filtered to Completed: 2 orders shown
Filtered to Submitted: 3 orders shown
Clear filter (All Statuses) restores all 15 orders
Search 'ORD-001' returns exactly 1 result: ORD-001
Search 'ORD-' returns all 15 orders
Search 'NONEXISTENT' returns 0 rows
Clear search restores all 15 orders
New Order button opens wizard at /orders/new with step 1 content
3 steps shown: Product Details, Production Parameters, Review & Submit
Product dropdown has 6 products: Steel Bracket A, Aluminum Frame B, Hydraulic Seal Kit, Copper Wire Harness, Polymer Coating Mix, Precision Bearing Unit
Quantity spinbutton input exists and accepts numbers
Priority dropdown has Low, Medium, High, Critical
Due Date textbox input exists
Validation errors on Product, Quantity, and Due Date. Priority has default 'Medium' so no error.
Only 'Product is required' error when product not selected
Only 'Valid quantity is required' error when quantity not filled
Only 'Due date is required' error when date not filled
Step 1 filled (Steel Bracket A, qty 100, Medium, 2026-04-01), navigated to step 2 'Production Parameters'
Production Line dropdown has 4 options: Assembly Line Alpha, CNC Machining Center, Coating Station, Quality Lab
Error 'Production line is required' when Next clicked without selection
Shift dropdown has Morning, Afternoon, Night
Notes textarea exists, accepted 'Test notes' input
Proceeded to step 3 with default shift (Morning), no error
Proceeded to step 3 without notes, no error
Navigated to step 3 'Review & Submit' after filling production line
Review shows: Product=Steel Bracket A, Quantity=100, Priority=Medium, Due Date=4/1/2026, Production Line=Assembly Line Alpha, Shift=Morning
Back from step 2 preserves step 1 data: Product=PRD-001, Qty=100, Priority=medium, Date=2026-04-01
Back from step 3 preserves step 2 data: Production Line=LINE-01 (Assembly Line Alpha)
Submit creates order, redirected to /orders/ORD-016 detail page showing Draft status
Order detail page shows ORD-016. No toast notification, but redirect to detail page with order number serves as confirmation.
ORD-016 appears as first row in orders grid
ORD-016 shows Draft status in grid
Order created as Admin (same as TC101)
BUG: Supervisor gets 403 Forbidden on /api/products and /api/production-lines. Wizard page renders blank due to crash (TypeError: u.map is not a function).
BUG: Operator gets 403 Forbidden on /api/products and /api/production-lines. Same crash as TC106 - wizard page renders blank.
